name: Tooling
description: Our tooling department creates precision dies, jigs, and fixtures using advanced CNC machines and skilled craftsmen. We manufacture custom tooling solutions for in-house component manufacturing across automotive and industrial sectors.

name: Machining
description: Our machining division specialises in precision turning, milling, and drilling operations. We produce high-quality components for automotive, agricultural, and industrial machinery with tight tolerances.

name: Press Operations
description: Our press shop is equipped with various capacity presses for stamping, forming, and deep drawing operations. We handle both high-volume production and prototype development with consistent precision.

name: Cutting
description: Our subtractive manufacturing process uses force or other techniques to divide a metal sheet into desired shapes or sizes with high accuracy and clean edges, readying components for the next stage.

name: Welding
description: Our welding joins two or more metal pieces by melting them together to create a strong, fused bond. With multiple welding techniques and certified welders, we ensure structural integrity across all assemblies.
